software.name: 3dastfir
software.publisher: ティーアンドイーソフト (T&E Soft)

software.name: ax1
software.notes: Arabian Rhapsody: pc6001mk2 draws without border colors (verify)

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 2 for all but Demo (Mode 1, Page 1)

software.name: ax2
software.notes: Steal Alien: stuck [keyboard] arrows

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1 for Demonstration, Nostromo and Steal Alien. Mode 1, Page 2 for Dual Alien and In the Woods. Requires -ram 16K

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1 for Demo, Cosmic Revo, Micro Othello and Slot Poker. Mode 1, Page 2 for Inter-Fight. Requires -ram 16K

software.name: ax4
software.notes: Black Hole: non-functional [joystick] inputs

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1 for Demo, American Football, Black Hole and Shut the Box. Mode 1, Page 2 for Car Race

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 2, Page 2 for Olion. Mode 2, Page 1 for Quest

software.name: ax6
software.notes: Demo: [CRTKILL] should corrupt video when AY-based speech plays back (cfr. real HW refs)

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1 for all but for Powered Knight (Mode 2, Page 1)

software.name: ax7
software.notes: The Asterodian: [VDG] glitch for ASCII text in title (verify)

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1 for all programs. The Asterodian uses joystick in port 2

info.name: alt_title
info.value: ギャラクシーミッション

software.name: ax9
software.notes: 3D Flight Simulator: non-functional [keyboard] in gameplay

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 2, Page 1 for 3D Flight Simulator, Bounder Robo and Demonstration. Mode 2, Page 2 for Blue Sky

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 2, Page 1 for Outlaw and The Seven Bibles, Mode 2, Page 2 for Pop Hand and Risuning

software.name: earthbnd
software.publisher: クリスタルソフト (Xtal Soft)

software.name: eformn
software.notes: [VDG] swaps gfx mode mid-scanline, has issues on vanilla pc6001 (uses a different setup on mk2)

software.name: genmatai
software.notes: Not extensively tested (language barrier)

software.name: holyswrd
software.publisher: クリスタルソフト (Xtal Soft)
software.notes: Not extensively tested (language barrier)

software.notes: Stuck [keyboard] arrows, no option for [joystick]? Has optional [tape] loading for extra stages

info.value: マグネチックフィールド

software.notes: Not extensively tested (language barrier)

info.value: Mode 2, Page 1. After loading select Y for joystick, which should be in port 2

info.value: ナナちゃんの禁じられた遊び

software.name: zunou
software.notes: Optional [tape] load and save for construction mode

software.name: fruitpan
software.notes: [VDG] Doesn't draw title screen semigfxs in pc6001 (btanb, check usage) Optional [tape] user level load and save

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 3, Page 1. Needs -ram 16K to load title screen GFXs properly.

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 3, Page 1. Fruit Panic data tape, load that first, press 3 on title, swap with this image and load.

software.name: packboy
software.notes: Covermount for an unknown I/O magazine issue (cover: PC6-401, tape: PC60-401) Playfield has no line on top (btanb)

software.name: p6note1
software.notes: 4 vartst: requires [keyboard] shift key held

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 2 for Biorhythm and Cassette Label Maker. Mode 1, Page 1 for everything else

info.name: alt_title
info.value: PC-6000 Note No. 1 スターコマンドΣ

rom.name: pc-6001 note no. 1 (eigo no fukisoku doushi test).p6

software.name: spaceinv
software.notes: Covermount for an unknown I/O magazine issue Title mispells as Space Inverders, which looks just a typo.

info.name: alt_title
info.value: スペース・インベーダー

software.name: spcmouse
software.notes: Released as covermount under GTX(II)-3 and Paperware PC-6001(1)

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 2, Page 2. Issue a CLEAR 10,&hd5ff before CLOAD

software.name: takeoff
software.notes: [VDG] doesn't show avoidable objects in pc6001 (btanb, check usage)

info.name: usage
info.value: Mode 1, Page 1. Needs -ram 16K to be playable on base PC-6001

software.name: 1scrprg
software.notes: Miscellaneous BASIC programs, made between 2005 and 2009 03 Tiny Typing: may warrant a CAPS from pc6001mk2 [keyboard] 04 Puchi Deka: crashes in pc6001 (wants 16KB RAM?) 05 Michinari: [VDG] doesn't draw text in pc6001 06 Nuketashi: don't know what to do (draws a number sequence, verify thru readme/BASIC listing) 07 Rendori: [VDG] doesn't draw semigraphics in pc6001 08 P6 Navi: throws a SN error at 60 09 At-tobi: not sure what to do (game reacts with [keyboard] space key) 10 Atehate: may warrant a CAPS from pc6001mk2 [keyboard] 12 Pirodori: [VDG] doesn't draw text in pc6001 13 Mukudori: [VDG] doesn't draw text in pc6001 15 Bunbetsu: not sure what to do (game reacts with [keyboard] space key) 16 Ketsuraku: not sure what to do 17 Tentori: not sure what to do
